channel.title: Nesting ESXi :: Field SE Lab Guide
channel.description: Why would do this? FortiLink trunks do not work in Proxmox due to Proxmox developers have reserved the use of VLANs 0 and 4095 (need to find link defintively describin this). There are “how-to” posts that I could not make work found in: global channels Support Forum working which means I could not get FortiSwitch VM’s to come online in Proxmox (and I know it works in ESXi.) Instead of building/needing a separate physical ESXi server (as it would be used solely for FortiSwitch VM’s), I nested ESXi inside Proxmox using the following steps. Important Not tested. Change 172.16.3.x subnet that is the external subnet to Proxmox and the SE Lab
